about_intro:
With over 15 years of professional software engineering experience, I specialize in architecting high-performance backends and decentralized systems. For the past few years, I have been a dedicated Rust developer, leading the design and implementation of complex B2B platforms, blockchain notarization systems, and smart contracts.

My background spans across diverse domains—from Fintech and Blockchain to Telecommunications and AI. I have a proven track record in lead developer roles, focusing on performance, scalability, and security. I am passionate about clean, maintainable code and building innovative solutions in fast-paced environments.
